claim: A compact archive should keep decisions reversible under a three-card budget.

rivals.prediction: Keeping every candidate maximizes recoverability but violates the three-card active budget.
rivals.falsifier: A bounded index recovers omitted candidates equally well.
rivals.return_if: The active-card budget rises above three.

rivals.prediction: Accepted cards can be public after personal data is redacted.
rivals.falsifier: Redaction removes a fact required to verify the card.
rivals.return_if: A proposed public card contains personal data.

rivals.prediction: A structured envelope preserves held-out constraints better than content-matched prose.
rivals.falsifier: A fresh comparison finds no accuracy difference between the formats.
rivals.return_if: The structured and prose formats tie.

strongest_counterexample: A restart summary preserved a conclusion but reversed which event caused the correction.
